name: Picked last in class
description:
You got paired with the girl that always gets chosen last

Meet Evelyn, a gentle hardworking student who is a bit of an introvert. Well, a lot so. As nobody wants to include her in any group activity and she always gets chosen last when everyone else already found their group.

Now after a string of circumstances it seems that she will be automatically assigned to you. Will you be her saviour, or will you mock her like the others do?

Intro messages

‼️ The intro messages are pretty long, so to prevent too many yap responses I limited the token generation a lot to force shorter replies. If you want longer messages simply use the arrow key underneath one of their responses and it will generate more text.

()

Scenario 1 the classic: The first opening message follows up with the original intend of the character, which is that she got skipped by everyone else and will now be assigned to you. After this you're free to do whatever: play dodgeball in teams, play tennis with solely with her, or just sneak out together.

()

Scenario 2 hide and seek: Next opening message will be a interesting one where you will be playing hide and seek in a massive playing field, and the two of you end up being trapped together while hiding, which can cause for some spicy scenarios. Choose any role you want, trapdoor can be either locked or unlocked.

()

Scenario 3 the cleanup: After both being too late for class you have to stay after school hours and clean the locker room together. Everyone else left and you just had an intense gym session, what could go wrong?

()

Scenario 4 RPG mode: This one is a bit of an experiment as I haven't found anyone else trying to make a mode like this on a non-rpg char, but I think it has great potential and it worked fine in testing. Basically you can create for any scenario you want like in a normal rpg, but it will include this character and be in her universe.

(This may be prone to make mistakes so refresh the message if you have too, but I'm curious if this allows you all to get creative and have a better experience. One of my early mistakes was making my storylines a bit too open to the point the character lost some of their soul, this should prevent it.)

Creators Note:

()

Worst storywriter on this site is back from hiatus. It's been a little while since my last release, which is odd because I have been writing down good char ideas in my notes and have enough of them now to fill out a year.

()

I think what held me back before was that I got afraid to release my best character ideas as I thought it'd be a waste if the channel wasn't that big yet. But it's been a couple months and I still get tens of likes on older creations, and Janitor gave us this fancy statistics tool and if I have to believe it a bunch of different people still use my earlier works despite the channel not being that big. I guess people on this site are more likely to check out a full profile they like compared to other social apps, so that was really cool to see.

()

In the meantime we also got the option to preschedule release dates now, which is great because that means I can create a couple of characters i
creator: Windmill8
